Objective: Verify a new customer can register successfully
Test Steps: 1. Open register page. 2. Enter name email and password. 3. Click Sign Up.
Expected Result: Account created successfully. User can login with new account.

Objective: Verify registered user can login
Test Steps: 1. Open login page. 2. Enter valid email and password. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Login successful. User redirected to dashboard.

Objective: Verify invalid password is rejected
Test Steps: 1. Open login page. 2. Enter valid email. 3. Enter wrong password. 4. Click Login.
Expected Result: Login fails and error message is displayed.

Objective: Verify empty login fields are validated
Test Steps: 1. Open login page. 2. Leave email and password blank. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Validation message displayed and submission blocked.

Objective: Verify user can logout successfully
Test Steps: 1. Click Logout button.
Expected Result: User logged out and redirected to login page.

Objective: Verify protected pages cannot open without login
Test Steps: 1. Open dashboard/cart/profile URL directly.
Expected Result: User redirected to login page.

Objective: Verify logged-in user can view profile details
Test Steps: 1. Open Profile page.
Expected Result: Name email and saved details are displayed.

Objective: Verify user can update profile name
Test Steps: 1. Open Profile page. 2. Click Edit name. 3. Enter new name. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Profile name updated successfully.

Objective: Verify password reset link can be requested
Prerequisites: User logged in with valid email
Test Steps: 1. Open Profile page. 2. Click Update password. 3. Click Send reset link.
Expected Result: Password reset link request submitted and message displayed.

Objective: Verify user can add a delivery address
Test Steps: 1. Open Profile page. 2. Click Manage addresses. 3. Click Add address. 4. Fill address form. 5. Save.
Expected Result: New address saved and displayed in address list.

Objective: Verify editing address updates existing address
Test Steps: 1. Open Profile page. 2. Manage addresses. 3. Click Edit. 4. Modify address. 5. Save.
Expected Result: Existing address updated without creating duplicate.

Objective: Verify invalid pincode is rejected
Test Steps: 1. Open address form. 2. Enter pincode less than 6 digits. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Validation error displayed for pincode.

Objective: Verify dashboard layout loads correctly
Test Steps: 1. Open dashboard page. 2. Observe sidebar cards and header.
Expected Result: UI loads without overlap and content is visible.

Objective: Verify sidebar buttons navigate correctly
Test Steps: 1. Click Products. 2. Click Cart. 3. Click My Orders. 4. Click Profile.
Expected Result: Each button redirects to correct page.

Objective: Verify dashboard works on different screen sizes
Test Steps: 1. Open browser responsive mode. 2. Test mobile tablet and desktop widths.
Expected Result: Dashboard adjusts correctly without broken layout.

Objective: Verify products are displayed to user
Test Steps: 1. Open Products page.
Expected Result: Product cards are displayed with image name price and action buttons.

Objective: Verify product search works
Test Steps: 1. Open Products page. 2. Enter product keyword in search. 3. Submit search.
Expected Result: Relevant products are displayed.

Objective: Verify category filter works
Test Steps: 1. Open Products page. 2. Select category filter.
Expected Result: Products from selected category are displayed.

Objective: Verify product details page opens
Test Steps: 1. Open Products page. 2. Click product card/details.
Expected Result: Product details page shows image description price stock and quantity selector.

Objective: Verify user can add product to cart
Prerequisites: User logged in and product in stock
Test Steps: 1. Open product details. 2. Select quantity. 3. Click Add to Cart.
Expected Result: Product added to cart successfully.

Objective: Verify cart displays added items
Prerequisites: Cart has at least one item
Test Steps: 1. Open Cart page.
Expected Result: Cart items are displayed with quantity price subtotal and total.

Objective: Verify cart quantity can be updated
Prerequisites: Cart has item with stock available
Test Steps: 1. Open Cart page. 2. Change quantity.
Expected Result: Cart updates quantity subtotal and total amount.

Objective: Verify item can be removed from cart
Prerequisites: Cart has at least one item
Test Steps: 1. Open Cart page. 2. Click Remove on item.
Expected Result: Item removed from cart and totals updated.

Objective: Verify all cart items can be cleared
Test Steps: 1. Open Cart page. 2. Click Clear Cart.
Expected Result: Cart becomes empty.

Objective: Verify user can checkout using saved address
Prerequisites: User logged in cart has items and saved address exists
Test Steps: 1. Open Checkout page. 2. Select saved address. 3. Select payment method. 4. Place order.
Expected Result: Order placed successfully using selected saved address.

Objective: Verify user can enter new address during checkout
Prerequisites: User logged in and cart has items
Test Steps: 1. Open Checkout page. 2. Click Add new delivery address. 3. Enter valid address. 4. Place order.
Expected Result: Order placed successfully with new address.

Objective: Verify checkout blocks missing address
Test Steps: 1. Open Checkout page. 2. Select Add new address. 3. Leave required fields blank. 4. Try placing order.
Expected Result: Validation prevents order submission.

Objective: Verify user can view order history
Prerequisites: User has placed at least one order
Test Steps: 1. Open My Orders page.
Expected Result: User orders are displayed with item details total and shipping address.

Objective: Verify order total and item count are correct
Test Steps: 1. Open My Orders page. 2. Check order amount and item count.
Expected Result: Displayed total and item count match ordered products.

Objective: Verify admin can access product management
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin. 2. Open Products page.
Expected Result: Admin can view manage edit and add product options.

Objective: Verify admin can add a new product
Test Steps: 1. Open Add Product page. 2. Enter product details. 3. Save product.
Expected Result: Product added and displayed in product list.

Objective: Verify admin can edit product details
Prerequisites: Admin logged in and product exists
Test Steps: 1. Open product edit page. 2. Modify details. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Product details updated successfully.

Objective: Verify normal user cannot access admin features
Test Steps: 1. Open admin-only route directly.
Expected Result: Access denied or redirected.

Objective: Verify admin can view registered users
Test Steps: 1. Open Users page.
Expected Result: User list is displayed correctly.

Objective: Verify admin can view all orders
Prerequisites: Admin logged in and orders exist
Test Steps: 1. Open Order History page.
Expected Result: All customer orders are displayed.
